typedef enum {
	zeliboba, 
	aboba, 
	sus
} aboba;
int sisipisi(int a, int b, aboba c) {
	int returnVal;
	const aboba p = c;
	int a, b, c, sum, prod, divis;
	double divisf;
	sum = a + b;
	prod = a * b;
	divis = a / b;
	divisf = a / b;
	returnVal = sum * prod + divis;
	return returnVal;
}
void sss() {
	const unsigned int s = 4;
	s = s + sisipisi(1, 2, 3, 4, 5 + 1000);
}
int main() {
}
